message:
refactor(tests): Replace as casts with explicit type conversions

phase0_verification.rs:
- Add explicit u32 type annotations to loop counter variables
  (num_tasks, num_children, tasks_per_child) to enable u64::from()
- Replace `(expr) as u64` casts with `u64::from(expr)` for safer
  numeric conversions that are checked at compile time
- Removes clippy::cast_lossless warnings by using the lossless
  From trait implementation instead of raw casts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
